texto: I always said I'm just an instrument; I'm transparent, like a medium, the language passes through me. Which is a bit like saying I'm a recording device, I start and I go. I had a real connection to ongoing, language production in real time.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Constance Dejong: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “I always said I'm just an instrument; I'm transparent, like a medium, the language passes through…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, language, media pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de media e performance.
